summary: Added tp_price and sl_price to /api/trades payloads in dashboard_server.py.
tp_price is fixed at 0.85 and sl_price is computed server-side from entry_px and side.
commands_run: python -c "from dashboard_server import _fetch_trades; import json; trades=_fetch_trades(3); print(json.dumps([{'market_slug': t.get('market_slug'), 'tp_price': t.get('tp_price'), 'sl_price': t.get('sl_price')} for t in trades], indent=2))"
result: Verification showed /api/trades-derived rows now include tp_price and sl_price fields.
risks: Task brief still required removing hardcoded TP_PRICE / SL_PCT constants from dashboard.html, but dashboard.html was not included in allowed_files, so that frontend half was not performed.
